Author: snazz
Name: Snazzy P4
Punchline: A robust custom macro system for the Kefka UMAD/DMU Phase 4 mechanics.
Description: A robust custom macro system for the Kefka UMAD/DMU Phase 4 mechanics. Press the buttons for what you see in the fight and it lays out clean, colour-coded callouts. Open with /snazzyp4.
Changelog: The Undo button can now float as its own panel (Floating Undo button setting, on by default like Hide/Reset), and Acceleration text now shares the Stack/Spread line by default. See CHANGELOG.md.
